column4: POST /auth with valid username and password
column7:
1. Open Postman
2. Create POST request [https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth](https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/auth)
3. Add header Content-Type: application/json
4. Add JSON body {"username":"admin","password":"password123"}
5. Send request
